customFields.value:
Hi Brian,

I was looking into Olive Tree and saw you focus on Class B/C multifamily value add deals in the top 75 MSAs.

We don't buy or sell, but we do serve as the dedicated insurance arm for property owners and managers like you. We shop top carriers and push hard on pricing and coverage so your investors see stronger returns without extra work on your side.

If you're open to a quick call, I can show you how we trim premiums on similar assets.

All the best,
Rebecca Treanor
